goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'south'.
Make sure you get 'address', 'postcode', and 'entrance fee'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 19:00' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should depart from 'kings lynn'.
Make sure you get 'price', 'departure time', and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the south
Make sure you get address, postcode, and entrance fee
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 19:00 and should go to cambridge
The train should leave on wednesday and should depart from kings lynn
Make sure you get price, departure time, and travel time
